LanguageData.transcendence.label: <color=#C0C0C0>eternal recreation</color>
LanguageData.transcendence.description:
A glittertech integration matrix keeps cognitive, physical, biological, environmental, psychic, and battle-protocol channels active at all times. Linked effects switch with context: adaptive armor hardens as health drops, ranged posture calibration engages with ranged weapons, and strong melee gene resonance unlocks extra close-quarters optimization.
-- easyrim
LanguageData.bravesoul.label: <color=#00CED1>immortal soul</color>
LanguageData.bravesoul.description:
The immortal soul doctrine runs five channels in parallel: cognitive fervor, physical might, vital ascendance, combat mastery, and indomitable spirit. Its linked design is front-line focused, giving a stable baseline that brave-linked combat states can escalate into harder survival and melee pressure.
-- easyrim
LanguageData.pioneerspirit.label: <color=#87CEEB>pioneer spirit</color>
LanguageData.pioneerspirit.description:
The pioneer doctrine maintains physical, industry, combat, and resilience channels while synchronizing with colony command abilities. Linked effects branch by state: ranged firefights trigger vanguard fire discipline, civilian mode triggers settler throughput, and low-health combat forces a last-stand survival surge.
-- easyrim
LanguageData.adaptive_armor.label: <color=#646464>adaptive armor</color>
LanguageData.adaptive_armor.description:
Advanced adaptive armor that responds to the health condition. As health decreases, the armor becomes more protective but restricts movement. Nanoscale actuators analyze threat levels and automatically adjust defensive parameters.
-- easyrim
LanguageData.adaptive_armor.stages.0.label: adaptive armor (active)
LanguageData.adaptive_armor.stages.1.label: adaptive armor (alert)
LanguageData.adaptive_armor.stages.2.label: adaptive armor (defensive)
LanguageData.adaptive_armor.stages.3.label: adaptive armor (emergency)
LanguageData.adaptive_armor.stages.4.label: adaptive armor (fortress)
LanguageData.transcendence_battle_morph_verbs.label: nanite battle protocol
LanguageData.transcendence_battle_morph_verbs.descrip:
A standing nanite combat protocol derived from glitterworld battlefield doctrine. It does not replace natural limbs; instead, it overlays battle-prosthetic motion patterns through the neural lattice and continuously grants six melee maneuvers: phase cleave, kinetic ram, vector thrust, needle rake, heel spike, and sweeping kick.
-- easyrim
LanguageData.bravesoul_cognitive.label: cognitive fervor
LanguageData.bravesoul_cognitive.description:
Sharpened mind and heightened perception fueled by warrior spirit.
-- easyrim
LanguageData.bravesoul_physical.label: physical might
LanguageData.bravesoul_physical.description:
Unmatched agility and control honed through countless battles.
-- easyrim
LanguageData.bravesoul_vitals.label: vital ascendance
LanguageData.bravesoul_vitals.description:
Reinforced organs and accelerated recovery.
-- easyrim
LanguageData.bravesoul_vitals.stages.0.label: vital ascendance (stable)
LanguageData.bravesoul_vitals.stages.1.label: vital ascendance (awakened)
LanguageData.bravesoul_vitals.stages.2.label: vital ascendance (surging)
LanguageData.bravesoul_vitals.stages.3.label: vital ascendance (frenzy)
LanguageData.bravesoul_vitals.stages.4.label: vital ascendance (undying)
LanguageData.bravesoul_combat.label: combat mastery
LanguageData.bravesoul_combat.description:
Supreme martial prowess and adaptive defenses.
-- easyrim
LanguageData.bravesoul_spirit.label: indomitable spirit
LanguageData.bravesoul_spirit.description:
Unbreakable resolve that steadies the mind in the face of death.
-- easyrim
LanguageData.pioneerspirit_physical.label: frontier vigor
LanguageData.pioneerspirit_physical.description:
Refined physicality for exploration and hauling.
-- easyrim
LanguageData.pioneerspirit_industry.label: pioneer industry
LanguageData.pioneerspirit_industry.description:
Mastery of labor and production.
-- easyrim
LanguageData.pioneerspirit_combat.label: frontier marksmanship
LanguageData.pioneerspirit_combat.description:
Tactical superiority and combat readiness.
-- easyrim
LanguageData.pioneerspirit_resilience.label: survival instinct
LanguageData.pioneerspirit_resilience.description:
Endurance, recovery, and unshakable resolve.
-- easyrim
LanguageData.pioneerspirit_vanguard_fire.label: vanguard fire discipline
LanguageData.pioneerspirit_vanguard_fire.description:
In active engagements, scouting doctrine folds into precision ranged pressure and rapid target cycling.
-- easyrim
LanguageData.pioneerspirit_settler_engine.label: settler throughput engine
LanguageData.pioneerspirit_settler_engine.description:
Outside direct combat, the pioneer mindset reorganizes labor into a relentless high-output routine.
-- easyrim
LanguageData.pioneerspirit_laststand.label: frontier last stand
LanguageData.pioneerspirit_laststand.description:
When collapse is imminent, every reserve is burned to keep moving, shooting, and surviving through the worst minute.
-- easyrim
LanguageData.pioneer_frontier_edict.label: frontier edict
LanguageData.pioneer_frontier_edict.description:
A short doctrine pulse synchronizes movement, labor cadence, and weapon handling for intense frontier response windows.
-- easyrim
LanguageData.WorkGuidance.label: work guidance
LanguageData.WorkGuidance.description:
After receiving precise guidance on work details and steps, work proficiency improves noticeably and learning accelerates sharply for a short time.
-- easyrim
LanguageData.WorkMotivation.label: united as one
LanguageData.WorkMotivation.description:
Galvanized by the colony mobilization call, this pawn works shoulder to shoulder with their comrades, throwing themselves into every task with exceptional drive and focus. The effect fades after one day.
-- easyrim
LanguageData.EasyMode_NeuralOverclock.label: neural overclock
LanguageData.EasyMode_NeuralOverclock.description:
The nervous system and musculature are operating far beyond normal safety limits. Motion becomes explosively fast and precise while accumulating tissue strain across the body.
-- easyrim
LanguageData.EasyMode_NeuralOverclockStrain.label: overclock strain
LanguageData.EasyMode_NeuralOverclockStrain.descripti:
Localized neural and muscular damage caused by forcing the body beyond its safe operating limits.
-- easyrim
